bootSplash.title: Desktop Workspace
bootSplash.subtitle: Preparing the desktop shell, restoring local resources, and loading your first view.

tauri.shortDescription: Reusable Tauri desktop shell built on Vue and Vite.
tauri.longDescription: This project provides a reusable Tauri desktop shell with environment-aware build commands, a configurable boot splash, and a module-based frontend entry.
